nasb.text: May his name endure forever; May his name increase as long as the sun shines; And let men bless themselves by him; Let all nations call him blessed.

esv.text: May his name endure forever, his fame continue as long as the sun! May people be blessed in him, all nations call him blessed!

cnv.text: 願他的名永遠常存， 願他的名延續像太陽的恆久； 願萬人都因他蒙福， 願萬國都稱他為有福的。

ccb.text: 愿他的名流芳百世，如日长存。 愿万国都因他而蒙福， 都称颂他。

csbs.text: 愿他的名存到永远， 如太阳长久； 愿人们因他蒙福， 愿所有的国家都称他有福。
